title: I Tried the Open Source ElevenLabs Alternative (Voicebox)
summary: Voicebox is a free open-source local AI voice studio for developers offering voice cloning, text-to-speech, system-wide dictation, and REST API access. The tool positions itself as a privacy-focused alternative to cloud services like ElevenLabs with unlimited generation capabilities.
writeup: Better Stack tests Voicebox, a free open-source AI voice studio that runs locally and targets developers. The video covers its core features: voice cloning, text-to-speech, system-wide dictation, and REST API access. Voicebox is framed as a privacy-focused alternative to cloud services such as ElevenLabs, with local inference keeping data on the machine and no usage caps on generation. The practical takeaway is a self-hosted option for voice work that avoids per-use cloud limits and exposes an API for integration.
